name: Confetti Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions:
Microwave popcorn according to package directions.
Grease an 8-inch square pan. Remove unpopped kernals from popcorn. In a large greased bowl, combine popcorn with candy and peanuts. Place marshmallows and butter in a microwave-safe container. Microwave on HIGH for 1-1/2 to 2 minutes or until melted and smooth, stirring once halfway through cooking. Pour the marshmallow mixture over the popcorn mixture; toss until evenly coated. With buttered hands, press the mixture into the prepared pan.
Refrigerate until firm. Cut into bars.
